description: "Inactivated on 11th Apr,2012, mail by Vishwanath Gopalkrishnan because of   "As a part of the annual stock correction we need to send 1890 pcs from vishudh back to the brand" Composition Blue and white printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with a V-neck, short hooked placket, short sleeves, and has piping on the sleeves, placket and on the vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations This elegant kurta from vishudh is designed to flatter your silhouette and accentuate your femininity. Look stylish and ethnic and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and skinny jeans. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtas Height: 5'7" Chest: 33" Waist: 25"
